title: OKSN-195 Mother's Milk, If You Squeeze That Much... Minako Kahara - Minako Hanahara
overview: "I can't stand thinking about my mother anymore! I'm thinking about my mother's boobs every day!" There is a secret in the milk that drove my son crazy... Yes, breast milk comes out. Minako tries to calm down her violently erect penis, but eventually crosses the line between mother and child. In this way, the milking incest by the son who was fascinated by the mother's huge breasts and breast milk began.
